name: NetskopeEventsPage_CL - Create Table
cmd:
.create table NetskopeEventsPage_CL (
    TimeGenerated:datetime,
    RawData:dynamic,
    AgencyDomain:string,
    User:string,
    UserPrincipalName:string,
    SrcIP:string,
    DstIP:string,
    App:string,
    Category:string,
    AccessMethod:string,
    TrafficType:string,
    Policy:string,
    Severity:string,
    SeverityLevel:string,
    Url:string,
    Domain:string
)
    with (folder="Netskope/Events")

name: NetskopeEventsPage_CL - Create Function
cmd:
.create-or-alter function
    with (folder="Netskope/Functions/Events", skipvalidation="true")
fn_NetskopeEventsPage() {
    Netskope_Raw
    | where StreamType == "events_page"
    | extend
        AgencyDomain = tostring(split(split(tostring(RawData.user), "@")[1], ".")[0]),
        User = tostring(RawData.user),
        UserPrincipalName = tostring(RawData.userPrincipalName),
        SrcIP = tostring(RawData.srcip),
        DstIP = tostring(RawData.dstip),
        App = tostring(RawData.app),
        Category = tostring(RawData.category),
        AccessMethod = tostring(RawData.access_method),
        TrafficType = tostring(RawData.traffic_type),
        Policy = tostring(RawData.policy),
        Severity = tostring(RawData.severity),
        SeverityLevel = tostring(RawData.severity_level),
        Url = tostring(RawData.url),
        Domain = tostring(RawData.domain)
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        RawData,
        AgencyDomain,
        User,
        UserPrincipalName,
        SrcIP,
        DstIP,
        App,
        Category,
        AccessMethod,
        TrafficType,
        Policy,
        Severity,
        SeverityLevel,
        Url,
        Domain
}

name: NetskopeEventsPage_CL - Update Policy
cmd:
.alter table NetskopeEventsPage_CL policy update
@'[{"IsEnabled": true, "Source": "Netskope_Raw", "Query": "fn_NetskopeEventsPage()", "IsTransactional": false}]'

    Severity:string,
    SeverityLevel:string,
    AlertName:string,
    AlertType:string,
    Action:string,
    Activity:string,
    MD5:string,
    SHA256:string,
    FromUser:string,
    ToUser:string,
    Url:string
)
    with (folder="Netskope/Alerts")

name: NetskopeAlertsContent_CL - Create Function
cmd:
.create-or-alter function
    with (folder="Netskope/Functions/Alerts", skipvalidation="true")
fn_NetskopeAlertsContent() {
    Netskope_Raw
    | where StreamType == "alerts_content"
    | extend
        AgencyDomain = tostring(split(split(tostring(RawData.user), "@")[1], ".")[0]),
        User = tostring(RawData.user),
        UserPrincipalName = tostring(RawData.userPrincipalName),
        SrcIP = tostring(RawData.srcip),
        DstIP = tostring(RawData.dstip),
        App = tostring(RawData.app),
        Category = tostring(RawData.category),
        AccessMethod = tostring(RawData.access_method),
        TrafficType = tostring(RawData.traffic_type),
        Policy = tostring(RawData.policy),
        Severity = tostring(RawData.severity),
        SeverityLevel = tostring(RawData.severity_level),
        AlertName = tostring(RawData.alert_name),
        AlertType = tostring(RawData.alert_type),
        Action = tostring(RawData.action),
        Activity = tostring(RawData.activity),
        MD5 = tostring(RawData.md5),
        SHA256 = tostring(RawData.sha256),
        FromUser = tostring(RawData.from_user),
        ToUser = tostring(RawData.to_user),
        Url = tostring(RawData.url)
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        RawData,
        AgencyDomain,
        User,
        UserPrincipalName,
        SrcIP,
        DstIP,
        App,
        Category,
        AccessMethod,
        TrafficType,
        Policy,
        Severity,
        SeverityLevel,
        AlertName,
        AlertType,
        Action,
        Activity,
        MD5,
        SHA256,
        FromUser,
        ToUser,
        Url
}

name: NetskopeAlertsContent_CL - Update Policy
cmd:
.alter table NetskopeAlertsContent_CL policy update
@'[{"IsEnabled": true, "Source": "Netskope_Raw", "Query": "fn_NetskopeAlertsContent()", "IsTransactional": false}]'
